The Union of Soviet Socialist Republics is the ultimate vanguard of the socialist movement and the red flag that towers over the city of Moscow is just more proof that even the workers who have been at the bottom of the barrel throughout most of human history can and will write the next chapters of history.

About the Central Government structure

Constitutional Base

The State Constitution

The Union of Soviet Socialist Republics currently uses the Vanguard Constitution that has served as the first and official constitution since the establishment of the union. Citizens may create petitions directly addressing the constitution.

Supreme Legislation

The SUPREME SOVIET

The Supreme Soviet is the highest state organ and consists of two equal chambers. First known as the lower chamber, the Soviet of the Union, which is designed to represent the interests of the general population. The upper chamber, known as the Soviet of Nationalities, represents the diverse ethnic and national groups across the union republics.

Administrative Desk

The PEOPLE'S Council of Ministers

The People's Council of Ministers is the highest executive and administrative organ that manages day-to-day defense, economy, state budget, foreign policy, science and more. The People's Council of Ministers is led by the Premier of the Soviet Union.

State Security & Community Defense

NATIONAL federal LAW

POLICE FORCE OF THE UNION // SOVIET INTERIOR

Tasked with upholding the national federal law of the union. The police force is also recognized as the cornerstone of the union. It is important to know the authority level of each police officer.

QUALITY OF LIFE

SOVIET EFFICIENCY

The Soviet Efficiency has the duties of ensuring everyone has completed their quotas. They also handle LOA (Leave Of Absence) requests and ban requests made by police officers, respond to petitions made by the citizens and may open investigations.

FOREIGN AFFAIRS

FOREIGN AFFAIRS

The Foreign Affairs of the Union is one of the most vital ministries we have. The ministry represents the union in diplomatic events, the ministry builds strong relations with other governments, and keeps the image of our government clean and respectable.

the responsibilities of the government

  • Maintaining domestic stability 
  • Maintaining foreign relations with other governments
  • Reviewing and responding to citizen needs
  • Oversight of ministry efficiency
  • Educating people of the world and bringing class consciousness forward

our Principles

  • Strength, Labour, Unity
  • Service to Soviet men and women
  • Going beyond and forwards

Pravda — Official News Bulletin

26 JUNE

THE GREAT START

As the Union of Soviet Socialist Republics is under construction, the constitution is in the works and we are opening opportunities for citizens.

Union of Soviet Socialist Republics

This is a mock government community on Discord mixing fiction with real information and data about the USSR. This is all purely for fun and roleplay.
